caption: Step 1: Open the Mondula multi-step form demo page
description: Open the Mondula multi-step form demo page
narration: And... action. Let's start by opening the Mondula multi-step form demo page. Every good walkthrough needs an establishing shot, and this is ours.

caption: Step 2: Move from the intro page to the first form step
description: Move from the intro page to the first form step
narration: Now the camera swings to the next beat. We move from the intro page to the first form step. This keeps the pacing deliberate instead of twitchy.

caption: Step 3: Fill first page text and textarea fields
description: Fill first page text and textarea fields
narration: Here comes the payoff shot. We fill first page text and textarea fields. This is exactly the repetitive work automation should steal from us.

caption: Step 4: Go to the next page with additional input fields
description: Go to the next page with additional input fields
narration: Quick scene change. We go to the next page with additional input fields. We keep the momentum without losing the thread.

caption: Step 5: Fill text, custom textarea, and date fields on page two
description: Fill text, custom textarea, and date fields on page two
narration: Cue the montage. We fill text, custom textarea, and date fields on page two. A little typing here saves a lot of future boredom.

caption: Step 6: Proceed to radio, checkbox, and dropdown inputs
description: Proceed to radio, checkbox, and dropdown inputs
narration: Now the camera swings to the next beat. We proceed to radio, checkbox, and dropdown inputs. It keeps the flow easy to follow without sounding like a checklist.

caption: Step 7: Select a radio option, multiple checkboxes, and a dropdown value
description: Select a radio option, multiple checkboxes, and a dropdown value
narration: Here comes the payoff shot. We select a radio option, multiple checkboxes, and a dropdown value. A clean selection like this keeps the workflow from improvising.

caption: Step 8: Open the conditional input section
narration: Quick scene change. We open the conditional input section. Now the viewer knows exactly where the story starts.

caption: Step 9: Fill conditional fields based on the selected dish
description: Fill conditional fields based on the selected dish
narration: Cue the montage. We fill conditional fields based on the selected dish. This is exactly the repetitive work automation should steal from us.

caption: Step 10: Move to the final contact-details page
description: Move to the final contact-details page
narration: Now the camera swings to the next beat. We move to the final contact-details page. A smooth move here makes the whole sequence easier on the eyes.

caption: Step 11: Fill final contact page with six required input fields
description: Fill final contact page with six required input fields
narration: Here comes the payoff shot. We fill final contact page with six required input fields. A little typing here saves a lot of future boredom.

caption: Step 12: Review summary and reach submit-ready final state
description: Review summary and reach submit-ready final state
narration: Roll credits. We review summary and reach submit-ready final state. This is where the screen starts telling a story instead of just showing raw numbers.
